# Ip int roundtrip (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Ip int roundtrip. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter is_ipv4(src_ip) = true | alter src_int = ip_to_int(src_ip) | alter src_back = int_to_ip(src_int) | fields src_ip, src_int, src_back | sort asc src_int
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 15). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
